description_long: This is a modern, minimalist bed with a rectangular frame and a simple, flat headboard featuring subtle button-like accents. The bed sits low to the ground on short, sturdy legs, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The mattress is clearly visible and appears to be of standard thickness, covered with a smooth, fitted sheet. The frame and headboard are uniformly colored, likely upholstered in a soft fabric or faux leather, with no visible footboard. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban apartments or lofts. The bed's proportions suggest it is a double or queen size, offering ample space for two people.
description: A modern, low-profile bed with a flat, button-accented headboard and a visible mattress, finished in a uniform, soft-looking material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat headboard with button accents and the full width of the mattress.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low profile, the thickness of the mattress, and the height of the headboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headboard and the rectangular shape of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bed's length and the absence of a footboard.
